title: [v1.82.0-beta.1] mRemoteNG.exe: wrong file version / wrong product version
author: judaspriest
body_snippet:
This is a small bug:

1. Download the current 2026-03-03-v1.82.0-beta.1-NB-3418-x64-selfcontained.zip
2. Extract it
3. Right click on the "mremoteng.exe" --> Properties --> Details

File version is: 1.80.2.3418 instead of 1.82.0.3418
Product version is: 1.80.2 (Release 3418) x64 instead of 1.82.0 (Release 3418) x64
